root_cause_verification.issue: SQLite compilation error for JSONB columns
root_cause_verification.reason: JSONB is PostgreSQL-specific type, SQLite doesn't support it
root_cause_verification.design_intent: Models designed for PostgreSQL with JSONB for GIN indexing and advanced JSON queries
